ItacPersonItem.Notes: As Animoso Infecondo, he signed Gli stratagemmi dell`ingegno (1679) and Il cavaliere della rosa (1676); as Accademico Humorista, he signed La melodia sacra (Roma, Buagni, 1689) none of these titles are in BL collections.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
